benefits.description: Receding hairline peaks filled back in; superior results compared to years of minoxidil use; effects persisted and reversed recession even after stopping minoxidil two years prior

protocol_notes: Previously used minoxidil (Regaine) for years with diminishing returns after stopping; GHK-Cu used in combination with MOTS-c; now has long hair; shaved head and observed regrowth was opposite of expected recession
